title: Archived service identity
description: Identity record for one archived service. Written once per service into $ARCHIVE_ROOT/corpus/<service_id>/site.json. Identity is host-level: distinct hosts are distinct services and are never merged by eTLD+1.

service_id.description: Stable directory-safe id: sanitized host plus 8 hex chars of sha256(host). The hash disambiguates hosts that sanitize to the same slug.

host.description: Normalized lowercase hostname (punycode for IDNs). No scheme, port, path, or userinfo.

source.description: Which monitor inventory this service came from (hvoy | manual | discovery | ...).

row.description: The exact inventory row as read.
